findings.title: Hardcoded API Key
findings.description: API key is hardcoded in source code, exposing sensitive credentials
findings.fix: Use environment variables or secure configuration management to store API keys

findings.title: Hardcoded Secret Token
findings.description: Secret token is hardcoded in source code, exposing sensitive credentials
findings.fix: Use environment variables or secure configuration management to store secret tokens

findings.title: Hardcoded Database Password
findings.description: Database password is hardcoded in source code, exposing sensitive credentials
findings.fix: Use environment variables or secure configuration management to store database passwords
